patch.raw_yaml:
- hosts: all
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install git and curl
      apt:
        name:
          - git
          - curl
        state: present
        update_cache: yes
    - name: Create aegis working directory
      file:
        path: /opt/aegis
        state: directory
        mode: '0755'
        owner: root
    - name: Write aegis config file
      copy:
        dest: /opt/aegis/config.conf
        content: |
          [aegis]
          version=1
          mode=strict
        mode: '0644'
        owner: root
